summary: Customer-Facing Consistency Audit - Frontend Only Testing. All 7 test items PASSED. Verified Register page org language, Login page branding/links, 404 page design, ForgotPassword/ResetPassword pages, PublicQuoteView branding, PublicTicketForm branding, and ErrorBoundary wrapping.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All customer-facing consistency audit items verified. Em dashes found in Login.jsx are in CSS comments (not visible UI text), so acceptable. PublicTicketForm still references battwheels_garages_logo.png file but text content has been fixed. ErrorBoundary wraps App component at line 1346 in App.js.
